query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NULL OR ocrRawText = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_ocr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NOT NULL AND ocrRawText != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ocr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN order_number IS NOT NULL AND order_number != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_order_num_col
FROM line_receipts 
WHERE status = 'pending';
